sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Misiang te totsa a tang akawcik lampi khat om ei,
Ih mai ah apaisa galhang te'n bawlsiatna thuak hi,
Hong pina leh a gualzawhna te hangin na lungdam leh,
Khukdin in lungdamna ko aw, nangah thupha hangin,

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Nuam aw, paak te leh singkung te hang in,
Nuam aw, mualte leh tuipi te hang in,
Nuam aw, nang leh kei hong hinsak man in,
Koi koi om ta leteh nuam aw.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Hih leitung ah dahna gentheihna leh huaihamna dim ei,
A kang ngeilo ciktui om a, sapna teng kicing sak hi
Topa kamciam na muang peuh leng mikim a ding kicing ei,
Na thupha sim sim lel dih in, A dang na nget ma in.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Topa hong vaikhaksa bangin a lampial te maisak aw
Bang hih cih theilo a hih ma'n amawh maisak in cizen.
Amau te'n zong teluh hi leh a nun na ki khel lel ding
Amau te na sanggam hicih phawk in la huhkhial ke'n
